sentences.text: My little boy fell off a ladder and hurt himself, and I am going to get the Doctor.
But he lives far away, and it is such a bad night, so I thought it would be better if you went instead of me.
You know I will give you my wheelbarrow, so you should help me in return.
'Certainly,' cried little Hans, 'I am happy you came to me, and I will start right away.
